name: apple-notes
description: Apple Notes integration via the memo CLI. Create, view, edit, delete, search, move, and export notes to HTML/Markdown. macOS-only skill using Homebrew-installable memo binary. Fully local, no cloud APIs required.
review: Apple Notes CLI integration from the official openclaw monorepo. Covers full note lifecycle (create/view/edit/delete/search/move/export). macOS-only by design with correct os:darwin metadata. Purely local, no network calls. Backed by the trusted openclaw/openclaw monorepo (289K stars). Drax PARTIAL is expected — not a defect.

drax_results.notes: macOS-only — requires memo CLI and Apple Notes.app
